{f:format.trim()} {f:if(condition: foo, then: foo, else: _all)} {f:if(condition: "foo", then: 'title="title"', else: '{foo}')} {f:if( condition: foo, then: '{foo ? bar : _all}', else: _all )} {f:if( condition: foo, then: foo, else: { 0: 'foo', 'test': 'bar', "lala": _all, sub: { 1: test, 2: another, 3: 'test {foo}' } } )} {f:if( condition: "foo", then: 'title="title"', else: '{foo}' )} {foo -> f:format.trim()} {_all -> f:format.trim(foo: bar) -> f:format.test(test: 'lala')} {icon -> f:format.case(mode: 'capitalWords') -> f:replace(search: '-', replace: '')} link <{headline}> <{f:if(condition: test, then: 'a', else: 'button')}> {f:uri.image(image: images.0, width: '{width * 2}')}
